content:
MODULE: cosmos.web.web.server
FILE: cosmos/web/web/server.py (6158 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Web Server - Full Feature Interface
Token-gated chat interface with ALL local features exposed
Real-time WebSocket for live action graphs and thinking states

Features Available WITHOUT External APIs:
- Memory system (remember/recall)
- Notes management
- Snippets management
- Focus timer (Po

CLASSES:
- RemoteEmotionalAPI: Proxy for the external Full Sensory System (Option 6/4).
  Methods: def get_state(self)
- CryptoQueryParser: Parses natural language to detect crypto/token queries and contract addresses.
A
  Methods: def parse(cls, message: str) -> dict
  Methods: async def execute_tool(cls, parsed: dict) -> dict
- ChatRequest(BaseModel)
- MemoryRequest(BaseModel)
- RecallRequest(BaseModel)
- NoteRequest(BaseModel)
- SnippetRequest(BaseModel)
- FocusRequest(BaseModel)
- ProfileRequest(BaseModel)
- ThinkingRequest(BaseModel)
- ToolRequest(BaseModel)
- WhaleTrackRequest(BaseModel)
- RugCheckRequest(BaseModel)
- TokenScanRequest(BaseModel)
- SpeakRequest(BaseModel)
- ConnectionManager: Manages WebSocket connections for real-time updates.
  Methods: async def connect(self, websocket: WebSocket)
  Methods: def disconnect(self, websocket: WebSocket)
  Methods: async def broadcast(self, message: dict)
  Methods: async def emit_event(self, event_type: str, data: dict, session_id: str='default')
  Methods: def get_session_history(self, session_id: str) -> list[dict]
- SwarmLearningEngine: Real-time learning engine that augments cosmos from Swarm Chat interactions.

In
  Methods: async def process_interaction(self, interaction: dict)
  Methods: async def run_learning_cycle(self)
  Methods: def get_learning_stats(self) -> dict
- SwarmChatManager: Manages the shared community Swarm Chat where all users interact together.
  Methods: async def connect(self, websocket: WebSocket, user_id: str, user_name: str=None)
  Methods: def disconnect(self, user_id: str)
  Methods: async def broadcast_system(self, message: str)
  Methods: async def broadcast_user_message(self, user_id: str, content: str)
  Methods: async def broadcast_bot_message(self, bot_name: str, content: str, is_thinking: bool=False)
  Methods: async def broadcast_tool_usage(self, user_id: str, tool_name: str, result: dict)
  Methods: async def broadcast_typing(self, bot_name: str, is_typing: bool)
  Methods: def get_online_count(self) -> int
- AutonomousOrchestrator: Autonomous agent that participates in the swarm chat.
Can use tools, trigger lea
  Methods: async def should_respond(self, message: str, history: list[dict]) -> bool
  Methods: async def generate_response(self, message: str, history: list[dict]) -> Optional[dict]
- EventType
- SearchRequest(BaseModel)
- QuantumConfig(BaseModel)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_lyapunov_gatekeeper()
- def get_emeth_harmonizer()
- def get_cosmos_swarm()
- def get_cosmos_cns()
- def get_multimodal_sys
